programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.desc: The Formula Regional European Championship heads to the Hungaroring for two races on one of the most technical circuits of the season. programme.title: Feyenoord vs Aston Villa FC - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - MD2
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: The last Dante
programme.desc: At 42 years old, the Brazilian players of Nice, Dante, is playing his last season of his career. For his last season as professional, he opens the door to follow him and remember his best moments

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. programme.title: Auxerre vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7
programme.desc: Auxerre have won only one of their last 10 Ligue 1 matches against Lens but that was the most recent, a 4-0 win in April 2025. Auxerre have won just one of their last 11 home games against Lens in all competitions, after winning seven of the previous eight.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7
programme.desc: Olympique Lyonnais are unbeaten in their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse FC, a longer run in the top-flight has only been recorded against Saint-Étienne. Olympique Lyonnais have conceded just three goals in Ligue 1 this season, the joint-lowest tally in the league alongside Nice, and their fewest after six matches of a top-flight campaign

programme.title: Ligue 1 - Film of the Season : Destiny
programme.desc: Destiny tells the story of a historic and completely crazy 2025/26 season through the voices of those who lived it.

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7
programme.desc: Angers have won their last two matches against Strasbourg in all competitions and could win three in a row for the very first time in 67 meetings between the two sides. Strasbourg have lost two of their last four Ligue 1 matches, as many defeats as they suffered across their previous 16 games in the competition.

programme.title: Monaco vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7

Le Havre failed to score for the third time in Ligue 1 in 2025 in their last match at Metz ; only Lyon and Paris SG have failed to score in fewer matches in the competition this calendar year among ever present teams. programme.title: Lille vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7
programme.desc: Lille have won just one of their last 13 home Ligue 1 games against Paris SG, a 5-1 victory on 14 April 2019, which remains Paris Saint-Germain's biggest away defeat in the top-flight in the 21st century. programme.title: PSG vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 8

programme.desc: Nice have lost each of their last three Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, as many as in their previous 11. programme.desc: Angers have lost 29 of their 56 Ligue 1 matches against Monaco, only losing more often against Lyon in the top flight. SCO have notably suffered eight defeats in their last nine Ligue 1 matches against ASM. programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 8
programme.desc: Marseille have won each of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against Le Havre, their longest winning streak against the same opponent in their top-flight history. Marseille have won each of their last four Ligue 1 matches but have not had a longer run since November 2022-January 2023.

programme.title: Race 1 - Norisring Round - Porsche Cup Germany 2026
programme.desc: The Porsche Carrera Cup heads to the Norisring for a high-intensity round on the famous street circuit in Nuremberg. programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Argentina and Cabo Verde in any competition. programme.title: Colombia vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Colombia and Ghana. Colombia have won each of their last four FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, all by margins of exactly one goal. However, they were eliminated in their only previous knockout stage game against such opposition.
